visual_summary: A collapsible tree view that displays a graphical representation of a directory structure. This component is useful when developers need to showcase or interact with a directory hierarchy, such as a file system or a project structure.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready table component with the following characteristics:

Name: File Tree Demo
Description: A collapsible tree view that displays a graphical representation of a directory structure. This component is useful when developers need to showcase or interact with a directory hierarchy, such as a file system or a project structure.
Style: collapsible, graphical
Interactions: expandable, selectable
Tags: tree, directory, hierarchy

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
